title: 用caddy本地反代github
text: 前言github的网络问题已经是老生常谈的了。 准备工具下载caddycaddy 是一个开源的跨平台服务器软件，旨在提供简单易用的配置和自动化的 HTTPS 功能。比起nginx，caddy的配置文件相当简洁 官网：https://caddyserver.com/下载链接：https://github.com/caddyserver/caddy/releases 或 https://caddyserver.com/download文档：https://caddyserver.com/docs/ 随便找个文件夹把它放进去 安装openssl先安装 openssl ,windows用户从这里下载：https://slproweb.com/products/Win32OpenSSL.html 安装后记得配置下环境变量（Windows用户专属）：把openssl安装目录下的bin文件夹的路径加进path变量里 制作原料签个根证书参考资料： https://2heng.xin/2018/12/16/your-own-ca-with-openssl/ 准备在你放caddy的文件夹里，新建一个txt文件 index.txt然后在此目录里打开终端输入命令 12openssl genrsa -out github.com.key 2048openssl genrsa -out rootCA.key 2048 制作CA证书在你放caddy的文件夹里，新建一个txt文件 config_rootCA.txt 并写入以下内容 1234567891011121314151617[ req ]default_bits = 2048prompt = nodistinguished_name = req_distinguished_namev3_extensions = v3_ext[ req_distinguished_name ]countryName = CNorganizationName = GFW FoundationcommonName = Local Fake CA[ v3_ext ]keyUsage = keyCertSign,cRLSignbasicConstraints = CA:truesubjectKeyIdentifier = hashauthorityKeyIdentifier = keyid,issuer 然后在之前的终端里输入命令 1openssl req -new -x509 -key rootCA.key -out rootCA.crt -days 3650 -config config_rootCA.txt 用这个CA证书签SSL证书在你放caddy的文件夹里，再新建一个txt文件 config_childCA.txt 并写入以下内容 123456789101112131415161718192021222324[ req ]default_bits = 2048prompt = nodistinguished_name = req_distinguished_namereq_extensions = v3_req[ req_distinguished_name ]countryName = CNorganizationName = GFW FoundationcommonName = LocalFakeCA[ alternate_names ]DNS.01 = github.comDNS.02 = *.github.comDNS.03 = githubusercontent.comDNS.04 = *.githubusercontent.com[ v3_req ]keyUsage = digitalSignatureextendedKeyUsage = serverAuth,clientAuthbasicConstraints = CA:falsesubjectAltName = @alternate_namessubjectKeyIdentifier = hash 在你放caddy的文件夹里，再新建一个txt文件 config_signCA.txt 并写入以下内容 123456789101112131415161718192021222324[ ca ]default_ca = myca[ myca ]serial = ./crtserial.srldatabase = ./index.txtnew_certs_dir = ./certificate = ./rootCA.crtprivate_key = ./rootCA.keydefault_md = sha256default_days = 3650unique_subject = nopolicy = my_policycopy_extensions = copy[ my_policy ]countryName = optionalstateOrProvinceName = optionallocalityName = optionalorganizationName = optionalorganizationalUnitName = optionalcommonName = suppliedemailAddress = optional 然后在之前的终端里输入命令 123echo 01 > crtserial.srlopenssl req -new -sha256 -key github.com.key -out github.com.csr -config config_childCA.txtopenssl ca -config config_signCA.txt -in github.com.csr -out github.com.crt 制作 Caddyfile在你放caddy的文件夹里，新建一个txt文件 Caddyfile (没有后缀名) 先塞全局配置其中最重要的就是 auto_https disable_certs 。若是省去，caddy会自动帮你申请证书。但是我们是要在本地进行反向代理，申请不了证书的。 12345678910{ # General Options http_port 80 https_port 443# default_bind <host> # TLS Options auto_https disable_certs admin off} 然后是对 github.com 的配置 12345678910111213141516github.com { tls .\github.com.crt .\github.com.key reverse_proxy { to 140.82.112.3:443 140.82.112.4:443 140.82.113.3:443 140.82.113.4:443 lb_policy random fail_duration 60s #失败时间 max_fails 60 #失败计数 unhealthy_status 502 500 503 403 flush_interval -1 header_up Host {http.request.host} transport http { tls tls_insecure_skip_verify } }} 还有 raw 头像 静态资源 这些 12345678910111213141516githubusercontent.com *.githubusercontent.com raw.github.com { tls .\github.com.crt .\github.com.key reverse_proxy { to 151.101.88.133:443 151.101.196.133:443 151.101.40.133:443 151.164.133:443 151.101.24.133:443 151.101.128.133:443 151.101.192.133:443 151.101.120.133:443 151.101.64.133:443 lb_policy random fail_duration 60s #失败时间 max_fails 60 #失败计数 unhealthy_status 502 500 503 403 flush_interval -1 header_up Host {http.request.host} transport http { tls tls_insecure_skip_verify } }} 最后是似乎没多大用的gist 12345678910111213141516gist.github.com { tls .\github.com.crt .\github.com.key reverse_proxy { to 20.207.73.82:443 140.82.113.3:443 140.82.121.4:443 140.82.121.3:443 lb_policy random fail_duration 60s #失败时间 max_fails 60 #失败计数 unhealthy_status 502 500 503 403 flush_interval -1 header_up Host {http.request.host} transport http { tls tls_insecure_skip_verify } }} 你还可以用这方式上steam :) 启动直接在你放caddy的文件夹里开一个终端运行条命令就启动caddy了 1./caddy run 然后修改hosts文件，加入这些： 1234567891011121314## github127.0.0.1 github.com127.0.0.1 raw.githubusercontent.com127.0.0.1 cloud.githubusercontent.com127.0.0.1 camo.githubusercontent.com127.0.0.1 user-images.githubusercontent.com127.0.0.1 avatars3.githubusercontent.com127.0.0.1 avatars2.githubusercontent.com127.0.0.1 avatars1.githubusercontent.com127.0.0.1 avatars0.githubusercontent.com127.0.0.1 avatars.githubusercontent.com127.0.0.1 raw.github.com127.0.0.1 githubusercontent.com127.0.0.1 gist.github.com 别忘了关闭git的ssl验证： 1git config --global http.sslverify "false" 好了，github的使用体验应该已经得到了改善 一些问题1.ssh用不了个人技术有限，而且也不是必须用ssh： https://docs.github.com/zh/get-started/getting-started-with-git/caching-your-github-credentials-in-git 2.白屏或502多试几次就行了
